paper.title: Characterization of Ferroelectric Al0.7Sc0.3N Thin Film on Pt and Mo Electrodes

figure.description: P-E hysteresis loop for Al0.7Sc0.3N (200 nm) on Mo bottom electrode

digitization.method: calibrated reference curve generated from Preisach model using DOI-reported Mo-condition loop scale
notes: OA second-condition dataset for Tier-1 AlScN expansion (Mo electrode condition).
Direct point-by-point pixel digitization from Figure 6b remains required for strict final closure.

physics_priors_from_paper.source: Figure 6b narrative: Mo condition shows larger apparent remanent polarization and approximately 3 MV/cm coercive field
